headline: Domino's CEO issues blunt message on growing problem
summary: Domino's Pizza had a complicated first quarter. In the U.S., the pizza giant kept growing its order count and gained market share. However, on the company's first-quarter earnings call, CEO Russell Weiner made it clear that one franchise is weighing heavily on Domino's (DPZ) global results. ...

headline: CFOs On the Move: Week ending May 8
summary: Shake Shack hires Portillo's former finance chief, Six Flags CFO steps down and Texas Roadhouse's ex-CFO joins Chuck E. Cheese’s parent company.

headline: Is Domino’s Pizza (DPZ) Still Attractive After Its Recent Share Price Slide
summary: If you are wondering whether Domino's Pizza at around US$332 per share still offers value, it helps to step back and look at what the recent share price and underlying valuation are actually telling you. The stock is around US$332.53 after a 2% slip over the last week, a 9.7% fall over the past month, and returns of 21.8% lower year to date and 29.1% lower over the last year, even though the 3 year return sits at 13.2% while the 5 year return is 15.9% lower. headline: Cramer Says He's 'Not Bullish' On Gold — Plus His Advice For Domino's Pizza Investors
summary: Cramer says Domino's last quarter was 'not so hot', advises against buying stock yet. Agnico Eagle Mines reported strong earnings, but Cramer not bullish on gold.
